{{Infobox character
| name = Overlord (Cradle)
| appears_in = Cradle
| titles = Overlord
| abilities = Consume, Northstrider's technique
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

''See also: [[Overlord (Cradle) Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Overlord is a significant stage of power within the world of [[Cradle]], representing a level of strength that sits above an [[Underlord]] but below an [[Archlord]]. Achieving this rank involves a revelation process centered on the concept of the present, whereas Underlords focus on the past and Archlords on the future. While an Overlord possesses a major advantage over those at lower ranks, experienced or highly skilled Underlords may still be able to defeat less capable or newly advanced [[Overlords]]. Individuals at this level can possess powerful spiritual traits, such as [[soulfire]], and utilize advanced techniques that can cause massive physical destruction. Their presence is often marked by a significant spiritual pressure. The rank is rare and highly impactful; for example, reaching this stage at a young age is considered an exceptional feat. Some individuals may reach the peak of this stage or even possess the potential to advance further toward becoming a [[Herald]]. The term is also used to describe specialized equipment, such as Overlord-level weapons or constructs, and can be applied to female practitioners as [[Overlady]].}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Overlord is a stage that [[Eithan]] has the potential to advance to.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c11">''Blackflame'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|An Overlord is defending [[Kiro]] and [[Meira]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c15">''Underlord'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The propulsion constructs on the cloudship thrum with an Overlord's power.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c17">''Underlord'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The journey to Overlord is a long one.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c4">''Uncrowned'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The box in Sophara's trial was protected by the power of an Overlord.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c11">''Uncrowned'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The Overlord stage represents a significant level of [[madra]] and power that serves as a major bottleneck for [[Lindon]]'s advancement. Reaching this rank requires a revelation that provides new insight into one's relationship with the world, though an unsuccessful attempt can result in a [[Path]] ending. While [[Lindon]] explores various methods to reach this stage, such as using the [[Consume]] technique or [[Northstrider]]'s methods, the process can be astronomically expensive. The power of an Overlord is immense, capable of filling [[Mercy]] when she opens the fifth page of her book and allowing her to temporarily advance to the rank. During conflicts, [[Overlords]] have led squads against [[Lindon]]'s team, and even an [[Underlady]] has struggled to maintain such high levels of [[madra]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Advancing to Overlord can result in a [[Path]] ending if the advancement is unsuccessful.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c4">''Wintersteel'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Mercy]] notes that [[Eithan]] is not performing much better without advancing to Overlord.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5">''Wintersteel'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Advancement to Overlord requires a revelation.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7">''Wintersteel'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Overlord is a stage or concept that [[Lindon]] seeks tips on.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8">''Wintersteel'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The power of an Overlord fills [[Mercy]] when she opens the fifth page of her book.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Winter Sage]] is concerned about [[Yerin]] advancing to Overlord without learning to read.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Overlord is a rank or stage [[Lindon]] hopes to reach using the [[Consume]] technique.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c9">''Wintersteel'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Advancing through Overlord can be astronomically expensive.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c11">''Wintersteel'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|An Overlord led a squad that locked onto [[Lindon]]'s team when they tried to take prisoners.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c13">''Wintersteel'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Using [[Northstrider]]'s technique could allow [[Lindon]] to reach Overlord in weeks.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c14">''Wintersteel'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Mercy]] can temporarily advance to Overlord.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16">''Wintersteel'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Overlord is a level of [[madra]] or power.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|An [[Underlady]] struggled to maintain an Overlord’s [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17">''Wintersteel'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|There were no [[dragons]] in the group above Overlord rank.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19">''Wintersteel'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Overlord is the bottleneck for [[Lindon]]'s advancement.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c23">''Wintersteel'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Overlord revelation]] provides new insight into how one relates to the world.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c24">''Wintersteel'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|An Overlord was ruined by [[Eithan]] with spiritual damage.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Pride]] mentioned fighting two [[Overlords]] at once.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c2">''Bloodline'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Overlord is a level of advancement higher than touching the [[Void Icon]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c5">''Bloodline'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Overlords]] are a rank or type of being that can be transported via teleportation anchors.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18">''Bloodline'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] holds the status of an Overlord.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c6">''Reaper'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Overlord is a legendary rank.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|An Overlord is a rank or type of entity below an [[Archlord]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c20">''Reaper'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Mercy]] could not reach the Overlord level on her own.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c25">''Reaper'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The peak of the Overlord stage can be reached by processing [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c10">''Dreadgod'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Orthos]] advanced to Overlord within months inside [[Ghostwind Hall]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c10">''Waybound'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Orthos]] devours an [[Overlord spirit]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c12">''Waybound'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|An Overlord is the most advanced crewman on an enemy cloudship.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c15">''Waybound'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Overlord is a stage of advancement that [[Reigan Shen]] reached.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|An Overlord can better recall lessons and sense the [[Way]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c10">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|“I don’t see him performing much better without advancing to Overlord, but if he has anything else in his pocket, he’ll be a tough one. I’ll need practice.”<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|“Do you have any tips for Overlord?” Lindon asked quickly.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|“Straining myself is fighting two Overlords at once.”<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c2" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
